title: Living in Boulder blog 8 - 3 - 2017: Almost finished classical history books

enrichment.summary: Kyle films himself late at night (3:34am) pointing out a skin lesion he wants biopsied, then talks about nearly finishing his reading of the Church Fathers, his plans to create an education/reading-log page, and his interest in color-coding a historical timeline of kings. He reflects on the depth and volume of patristic literature and why he thinks Church Fathers are underappreciated as classical authors.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: They are fascinating, underappreciated figures who deserve fame equal to classical authors, unfairly dismissed because they are Christian
Building an education page to track pages read will help maintain the habit of always listening to or reading old books
The sheer page count of Church Fathers writing likely dwarfs the Golden Age classical authors by perhaps 10x
